requirement_compliance.title: Single-view web home — remove tab navigation
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3 passing tests (TC-010h, TC-010e, TC-010f). HomeView.jsx renders stat tiles, triage, and project grid on /. AdminPanel rendered on /admin. No tab navigation in compiled output.

requirement_compliance.title: Project card — always-visible primary indicators
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3 passing tests (TC-011h, TC-011e, TC-011f). ProjectCard redesigned into 5 always-visible named sections: BLOCKERS, PIPELINE, QUALITY, GIT, VERSION. Grade badge in header.

requirement_compliance.title: Project card — expandable detail section
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3 passing tests (TC-012h, TC-012e, TC-012f). app-version-reader.js reads package.json .version or VERSION file. git-reader.js returns unpushedCommits and uncommittedFiles. Both exposed in collector/index.js.

requirement_compliance.title: Web admin panel — project listing
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3 passing tests (TC-013h, TC-013e, TC-013f). AdminPanel.jsx fetches GET /api/projects and renders AdminProjectList with project rows. Empty state shown when no projects.

requirement_compliance.title: Web admin panel — add project
requirement_compliance.evidence: 4 passing tests (TC-014h, TC-014e, TC-014n, TC-e2eAdminAdd). AdminAddForm.jsx with inline validation. POST /api/projects returns 201 and persists to disk. E2E verified via Playwright.

requirement_compliance.title: Web admin panel — edit and remove project
requirement_compliance.evidence: 4 passing tests (TC-015h, TC-015e, TC-015n, TC-e2eAdminRemove). AdminProjectList inline edit + RemoveConfirmDialog. DELETE /api/projects/:id returns 204 and removes from disk. E2E verified via Playwright.

requirement_compliance.title: Admin API — local HTTP endpoint for projects.json CRUD
requirement_compliance.evidence: 9 passing tests (TC-016h, TC-016n, TC-016e, TC-016f, TC-NFR010h, TC-NFR010e, TC-NFR010f, TC-NFR011h, TC-NFR011f). Full CRUD at /api/projects. Localhost-only (403 for non-127.0.0.1). Atomic writes via renameSync. Path traversal rejected. 500 on write failure.

requirement_compliance.title: CLI setup deprecation notice
requirement_compliance.evidence: 2 passing tests (TC-017h, TC-017e). setup.js replaced with deprecation notice printing /admin URL and exiting 0. No interactive flow.

requirement_compliance.title: CLI monitor deprecation notice
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3 passing tests (TC-018h, TC-018e, TC-018n). monitor.js created with deprecation notice printing localhost:3000 and exiting 0. cmdMonitor exported and wired in bin/aitri-hub.js.

requirement_compliance.title: Dark-mode only — remove light mode
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3 passing tests (TC-019h, TC-019e, TC-019n). [data-theme='light'] block removed from styles.css (54 lines). :root,[data-theme='dark'] changed to :root. No light-mode color variables in compiled bundle. Header theme toggle button removed.

requirement_compliance.title: Security — path traversal rejection
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-NFR010h (pass): POST with '../../etc/passwd' returns 400 path_traversal. TC-NFR010e (pass): '/valid/../etc/passwd' returns 400 path_traversal. TC-NFR010f (pass): non-existent absolute path returns 400. validateLocation() checks for '..' before any fs operation.

requirement_compliance.title: Observability — request logging to stdout
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-NFR011h (pass): GET /api/projects returns 200 without logging interference. TC-NFR011f (pass): error path logging does not crash server. logRequest() writes [ISO8601] METHOD /path STATUS to console.log on every request.

requirement_compliance.title: Usability — 768px viewport support
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-006e (pass via existing E2E): 768px viewport no horizontal scroll. styles.css includes responsive media query @media (max-width: 768px) for admin panel and card grid.
